findings.message: Use cardsV2 for Google Chat REST messages.
findings.remediation: Rename cards_v2 to cardsV2 for this profile.

findings.message: Workspace add-on action envelopes cannot be used as raw Chat message bodies.
findings.remediation: Pass only the message object to spaces.messages.create, or lint this payload with the workspace-addon-action-response profile.

findings.message: Accessory widgets are not supported on messages that contain attachments.
findings.remediation: Send the attachment and accessory controls as separate messages.

findings.message: Button must define onClick.action.function or onClick.openLink.url.
findings.remediation: Add an action function or openLink URL to the button.
